nasb.text: Men give gifts to all harlots, but you give your gifts to all your lovers to bribe them to come to you from every direction for your harlotries.

esv.text: Men give gifts to all prostitutes, but you gave your gifts to all your lovers, bribing them to come to you from every side with your whorings.

cnv.text: 人都把禮物送給妓女，你卻把你的禮物送給你所有的愛人，賄賂他們從四面來與你行淫。

ccb.text: 妓女接受淫资，你却送礼物给所有的情人，引诱他们从四方前来跟你淫乱。
